findings.description: RST cross-reference syntax `:ref:`log_output_in_batch_action`` appears verbatim in the knowledge file content. This is RST-specific markup that is non-functional in a JSON knowledge file context and may confuse an AI agent reading the file.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST directive: `\ :ref:`log_output_in_batch_action` \`. The referenced section (ログ出力) is correctly included as s6, so the information is available — only the dead markup is the issue.
